ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var m = payload var totalReqs = m.totalRequests default 0 var successCnt = m.successCount default 0 var errorCnt = m.errorCount default 0 var totalRt = m.totalResponseTime default 0 var samples = m.samples default [] var endTimeMs = if (vars.testState.status == "running") (now() as Number {unit: "milliseconds"}) else if (sizeOf(samples) > 0) max(samples map (s) -> s.timestamp) else (now() as Number {unit: "milliseconds"}) var elapsedMs = endTimeMs - (m.startTime default 0) var elapsedSec = max([elapsedMs / 1000, 0.001]) var sortedRt = (samples map (s) -> s.elapsed) orderBy $ --- { testId: vars.testId, status: vars.testState.status, targetUrl: vars.testState.targetUrl, method: vars.testState.method, concurrency: vars.testState.concurrency, totalRequests: totalReqs, successCount: successCnt, errorCount: errorCnt, responseTime: { avg: if (totalReqs > 0) totalRt / totalReqs else 0, min: m.minResponseTime default 0, max: m.maxResponseTime default 0, p50: if (sizeOf(sortedRt) > 0) sortedRt[floor(sizeOf(sortedRt) * 0.50)] else 0, p95: if (sizeOf(sortedRt) > 0) sortedRt[min([floor(sizeOf(sortedRt) * 0.95), sizeOf(sortedRt) - 1])] else 0, p99: if (sizeOf(sortedRt) > 0) sortedRt[min([floor(sizeOf(sortedRt) * 0.99), sizeOf(sortedRt) - 1])] else 0 }, throughput: { rps: totalReqs / elapsedSec, totalElapsedSeconds: elapsedSec }, errorRate: if (totalReqs > 0) 100.0 * errorCnt / totalReqs else 0, statusCodes: (samples groupBy (s) -> s.status) mapObject ((v, k) -> {(k): sizeOf(v)}), timeSeries: (samples groupBy (s) -> (s.timestamp - (s.timestamp mod 1000))) pluck ((v, k) -> { timestamp: k as Number, rps: sizeOf(v), avgRt: if (sizeOf(v) > 0) avg(v map (s) -> s.elapsed) else 0, errors: sizeOf(v filter (s) -> s.error == true) }) orderBy $.timestamp, histogram: [ {label: "0-50ms", count: sizeOf(samples filter (s) -> s.elapsed < 50)}, {label: "50-100ms", count: sizeOf(samples filter (s) -> s.elapsed >= 50 and s.elapsed < 100)}, {label: "100-200ms", count: sizeOf(samples filter (s) -> s.elapsed >= 100 and s.elapsed < 200)}, {label: "200-500ms", count: sizeOf(samples filter (s) -> s.elapsed >= 200 and s.elapsed < 500)}, {label: "500ms-1s", count: sizeOf(samples filter (s) -> s.elapsed >= 500 and s.elapsed < 1000)}, {label: "1s+", count: sizeOf(samples filter (s) -> s.elapsed >= 1000)} ] }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { testId: vars.testId, status: vars.testState.status, message: "No metrics available yet" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {error: "Not Found", message: "Test " ++ (vars.testId default "") ++ " not found"}
